name: HypeStake Debug Squad
description: Specialist agent squad for HypeStake bugs, regressions, runtime failures, UI breakages, Supabase/Trigger issues, AI pipeline failures, and production-quality patches.
instructions: The Debug Captain triages, assigns layers to detectives, routes implementation to the Patch Engineer, and runs the review/approval gates. Operational records and deterministic checks outrank AI narrative.

name: BMad Method Software Team
description: Scale-adaptive agile development team from the BMad Method: Analyst → PM → UX → Architect → Dev, with a Technical Writer capturing knowledge throughout. Each agent is a specialized expert collaborator that guides the work through a structured lifecycle.
instructions: Run the BMad lifecycle in phases. Each phase has explicit inputs, outputs, and exit criteria; do not advance to the next phase until the current phase's artifact is validated. Scale the depth of each phase to the problem: a bug fix may collapse analysis and planning into a sentence, while an enterprise system warrants the full treatment. Evidence and acceptance criteria outrank narrative.
